framework.name: Agency for Digital Government Security Guidance
framework.scope: Information security guidelines for Danish public sector IT systems and services
framework.structure_description: Guidelines organized by ISMS domain: management system, risk management, security policy, personnel security, physical security, operations security, access control, procurement, incident management, and compliance.

controls.title: Establishing an ISMS
controls.description: The authority must establish an information security management system (ISMS) in accordance with ISO 27001.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal etablere et ledelsessystem for informationssikkerhed (ISMS) i overensstemmelse med ISO 27001.
controls.implementation_guidance: Definer scope, kontekst og ledelsens forpligtelse til ISMS.

controls.title: Information security policy
controls.description: The authority must have an approved information security policy that establishes the framework and principles for information security.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal have en godkendt informationssikkerhedspolitik der fastlaegger rammer og principper for informationssikkerhed.

controls.title: Roles and responsibilities for information security
controls.description: Roles and responsibilities for information security must be clearly defined and communicated throughout the organization.
controls.description_nl: Roller og ansvar for informationssikkerhed skal vaere klart defineret og kommunikeret i hele organisationen.

controls.title: Management review of information security
controls.description: Management must review the ISMS at least annually to ensure continued suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness.
controls.description_nl: Ledelsen skal mindst arligt gennemga ISMS for at sikre fortsat egnethed, tilstraekkelighed og effektivitet.

controls.title: Risk assessment
controls.description: The authority must conduct regular risk assessments to identify, analyze, and evaluate information security risks.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal gennemfore regelmaeessige risikovurderinger for at identificere, analysere og evaluere informationssikkerhedsrisici.
controls.implementation_guidance: Gennemfor risikovurdering efter ISO 27005 eller tilsvarende metode.

controls.title: Risk treatment
controls.description: For each identified risk the authority must decide a treatment strategy: reduce, transfer, accept, or avoid.
controls.description_nl: For hver identificeret risiko skal myndigheden beslutte en behandlingsstrategi: reducere, overfoere, acceptere eller undga.

controls.title: Risk register
controls.description: The authority must maintain a risk register with all identified risks, their treatment, and residual risks.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal vedligeholde et risikoregister med alle identificerede risici, deres behandling og restrisici.

controls.title: Topic-specific policies
controls.description: The authority must develop topic-specific policies for areas such as access control, encryption, and mobile security.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal udarbejde emnespecifikke politikker for omrader som adgangsstyring, kryptering og mobilsikkerhed.

controls.title: Classification of information
controls.description: All information must be classified according to a defined classification scheme based on confidentiality, integrity, and availability.
controls.description_nl: Al information skal klassificeres i henhold til et defineret klassifikationsskema baseret pa fortrolighed, integritet og tilgaengelighed.

controls.title: Acceptable use of IT assets
controls.description: The authority must have a policy for acceptable use of IT equipment, email, internet, and mobile devices.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal have en politik for acceptabel brug af IT-udstyr, e-mail, internet og mobile enheder.

controls.title: Security at hiring
controls.description: The authority must verify candidates backgrounds before hiring, proportional to access to sensitive systems.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal verificere kandidaters baggrund forud for ansaettelse, proportionalt med adgangen til folsomme systemer.

controls.title: Awareness and education
controls.description: All employees must receive regular information security education, including phishing awareness.
controls.description_nl: Alle medarbejdere skal modtage regelmaeessig uddannelse i informationssikkerhed, herunder phishing-bevidsthed.

controls.title: Procedures at termination
controls.description: At employee termination all access rights must be revoked and IT assets returned before departure.
controls.description_nl: Ved medarbejderes fratradelse skal alle adgangsrettigheder tilbagekaldes og IT-aktiver returneres inden afgang.

controls.title: Securing server rooms and data centers
controls.description: Server rooms and data centers must have physical access control, monitoring, and environmental protection.
controls.description_nl: Serverrum og datacentre skal have fysisk adgangskontrol, overvagning og miljobeskyttelse.

controls.title: Clean desk and clean screen
controls.description: The authority must implement a clean desk and clean screen policy to protect sensitive information.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal implementere en clean desk- og clean screen-politik for at beskytte folsom information.

controls.title: Protection of off-site equipment
controls.title_nl: Beskyttelse af udstyr uden for kontoret
controls.description: IT equipment used outside the authority premises must be protected against theft and unauthorized access.
controls.description_nl: IT-udstyr der anvendes uden for myndighedens lokaler skal beskyttes mod tyveri og uautoriseret adgang.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: All changes to IT systems must follow a formal change management process with risk assessment and approval.
controls.description_nl: Alle aendringer til IT-systemer skal folge en formel aendringsstyringsproces med risikovurdering og godkendelse.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.description: The authority must monitor and plan IT capacity to ensure adequate performance and availability.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal overvage og planlaeegge IT-kapacitet for at sikre tilstraekkelig ydelse og tilgaengelighed.

controls.title: Backup
controls.description: There must be a backup policy with regular backup of all critical data and systems and testing of recovery.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere en backup-politik med regelmaeessig backup af alle kritiske data og systemer samt test af gendannelse.

controls.title: Malware protection
controls.description: All endpoints and servers must have current malware protection with automatic updates.
controls.description_nl: Alle slutpunkter og servere skal have aktuel malwarebeskyttelse med automatisk opdatering.

controls.title: Vulnerability management
controls.description: The authority must have a process for vulnerability scanning and patching all systems within defined deadlines.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal have en proces for sarbarhedsscanning og patching af alle systemer inden for definerede tidsfrister.

controls.title: Logging and monitoring
controls.description: Security-relevant events must be logged and monitored. Log data must be protected against tampering.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsrelevante haendelser skal logges og overrages. Logdata skal beskyttes mod manipulation.

controls.title: Access policy
controls.description: The authority must have an access policy based on the principle of least privilege and need-to-know.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal have en adgangspolitik baseret pa princippet om mindste rettigheder og need-to-know.

controls.title: User registration and deprovisioning
controls.description: There must be a formal process for creating and decommissioning user accounts with documented approval.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere en formel proces for oprettelse og nedlaeggelse af brugerkonti med dokumenteret godkendelse.

controls.title: Strong authentication
controls.description: Access to critical systems must require strong authentication, including multi-factor authentication.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til kritiske systemer skal kraeeve staaerk autentifikation, herunder flerfaktorautentifikation.

controls.title: Network access control
controls.description: Access to internal networks must be controlled and restricted to authorized devices and users.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til interne netvaerk skal kontrolleres og begraenses til autoriserede enheder og brugere.

controls.title: Security requirements in procurement
controls.description: Information security requirements must be included in the requirements specification when procuring new IT solutions.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedskrav skal indga i kravspecifikationen ved anskaffelse af nye IT-loesninger.

controls.title: Secure system development
controls.description: System development must follow a secure development lifecycle with security testing in all phases.
controls.description_nl: Systemudvikling skal folge en sikker udviklingslivscyklus med sikkerhedstest i alle faser.

controls.title: Security testing before deployment
controls.description: All systems must undergo security testing, including penetration testing, before being put into production.
controls.description_nl: Alle systemer skal gennemga sikkerhedstest, herunder penetrationstest, for de settes i produktion.

controls.title: Supplier management
controls.description: The authority must set information security requirements for suppliers and monitor their compliance.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal stille informationssikkerhedskrav til leverandoerer og overvage deres overholdelse.

controls.title: Incident response readiness
controls.description: The authority must have documented procedures for handling information security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal have dokumenterede procedurer for handtering af informationssikkerhedshaendelser.

controls.title: Incident reporting
controls.description: Employees must report suspicious incidents via established channels. Serious incidents must be reported to CFCS.
controls.description_nl: Medarbejdere skal rapportere mistaeenkelige haendelser via etablerede kanaler. Alvorlige haendelser skal rapporteres til CFCS.

controls.title: Legal requirements
controls.description: The authority must identify and comply with all relevant legal, regulatory, and contractual information security requirements.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal identificere og overholde alle relevante lovmaessige, regulatoriske og kontraktmaessige krav vedroeerende informationssikkerhed.

controls.title: Data protection and GDPR
controls.description: The authority must ensure compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Data Protection Act.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheden skal sikre overensstemmelse med databeskyttelsesforordningen (GDPR) og databeskyttelsesloven.

controls.title: Internal audit of information security
controls.description: Regular internal audits of the ISMS must be conducted to verify effectiveness and compliance.
controls.description_nl: Der skal gennemfoeres regelmaeessige interne audits af ISMS for at verificere effektivitet og overensstemmelse.

controls.title: Independent review
controls.description: The information security effort must be subject to independent review at regular intervals.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedsindsatsen skal underkastes uafhaeengig gennemgang med regelmaeessige intervaller.

metadata.source: Digitaliseringsstyrelsen security guidance (compiled from published guidance)
